description: Workflow hooks for Codex. SessionStart records unified session-scoped workflow state, uses transcript metadata for workflow-operator subagents, injects config-specific operator bootstrap context for the operator, and injects provider-backed workflow authoring policy only for main sessions when .workflow/config.yml exists in the active project. UserPromptSubmit reads mentioned GitHub issue references through cache-aware provider reads and injects project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext. Stop emits no JSON output.

hooks.description: Inject workflow authoring resolver policy for configured workflow projects in main sessions
Cache mentioned GitHub issue references and inject project-relative issue cache paths as additionalContext
Finish the workflow Stop hook without provider reads or JSON output
